entry_point.FQNAME: com.interim.hours.ui.calendar.CalendarScreenKt void CalendarGrid(java.util.Calendar selectedMonth, java.util.Map<java.lang.Integer,? extends java.util.List<com.interim.hours.data.model.WorkDayWithDetails>> workDaysByDay, java.util.Calendar selectedDayCalendar, kotlin.jvm.functions.Function1<? super java.util.Calendar,kotlin.Unit> onDayClick)

problem.description: Condition 'selectedDayCalendar?.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH) == dayNum && selectedDayCalendar.get(Calendar.MONTH) == selectedMonth.get(Calendar.MONTH) && selectedDayCalendar.get(Calendar.YEAR) == selectedMonth.get(Calendar.YEAR)' is always false

entry_point.FQNAME: com.interim.hours.ui.calendar.CalendarScreenKt void CalendarGrid(java.util.Calendar selectedMonth, java.util.Map<java.lang.Integer,? extends java.util.List<com.interim.hours.data.model.WorkDayWithDetails>> workDaysByDay, java.util.Calendar selectedDayCalendar, kotlin.jvm.functions.Function1<? super java.util.Calendar,kotlin.Unit> onDayClick)

problem.description: Condition 'selectedDayCalendar?.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH) == dayNum && selectedDayCalendar.get(Calendar.MONTH) == selectedMonth.get(Calendar.MONTH)' is always false

entry_point.FQNAME: com.interim.hours.ui.calendar.CalendarScreenKt void CalendarGrid(java.util.Calendar selectedMonth, java.util.Map<java.lang.Integer,? extends java.util.List<com.interim.hours.data.model.WorkDayWithDetails>> workDaysByDay, java.util.Calendar selectedDayCalendar, kotlin.jvm.functions.Function1<? super java.util.Calendar,kotlin.Unit> onDayClick)
